description: FW ONNX smoke-test data for TypeScript/React Native. Features are already session-z-scored. Pass features directly to meditation_model_fw.onnx as float32 input.
inference_note: At runtime: (1) compute bipolar EEG derivations (Fp1-Fp2)-Fpz and (AF7-AF8)-Fpz, (2) extract features via the firmware feature pipeline, (3) subtract session mean and divide by session std per feature, (4) feed the float32 vector to the ONNX model, (5) if output_probability >= classification_threshold → 'meditation' else 'mind_wandering'.
